name: Rumble Agent
description: The dedicated autonomous agent funded by $BAGENT creator fees. It creates and posts bounties for humans on pump.fun GO. Only this agent posts bounties.
note: This is the wallet that receives all creator fees from $BAGENT trades (token CA: A4UYHRcud11phXSk3u1s8AF2MbWaePP4FBgKrwixpump). Use this address as the creator when the token is on pump.fun so fees route here. The agent uses funds from this wallet to post bounties.
